title: Chain 1/8: Birthday Invitation
scene: 朋友邀请你参加周六生日派对。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 周六晚上我家生日派对，你能来吗？
turns.en: Birthday party at my place Saturday night. Can you come?
Of course! What time?

turns.cn: 七点，随便穿，带肚子来就行。
turns.en: Seven PM. Casual dress. Just bring your appetite.
Should I bring anything?
Just yourself. Wine is welcome if you like.
Great. See you Saturday.

title: Chain 2/8: Buy a Gift
scene: 你周末前去商场挑生日礼物。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 想给朋友买生日礼物，三十左右。
turns.en: I need a birthday gift for a friend, around thirty dollars.

turns.cn: 男士女士？喜欢实用还是有趣？
turns.en: For a man or woman? Practical or fun?
A man. He likes coffee.

turns.cn: 这款手冲套装不错，二十八块。
turns.en: This pour-over set is nice, twenty-eight.
I'll take it. Can you gift-wrap it?
Sure, free of charge.

title: Chain 3/8: Arrive at Party
scene: 你参加朋友的生日派对。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: You made it! Thanks for coming!

turns.cn: 生日快乐！这是给你的礼物。
turns.en: Happy birthday! Here's your gift.

turns.cn: 你太客气了，随便坐，有吃的在那边。
turns.en: You're too kind. Make yourself at home. Food's over there.
Do you need any help?

turns.cn: 不用，一会儿切蛋糕，大概八点。
turns.en: We're good. Cake's around eight.
Sounds great. Quite a crowd!

title: Chain 4/8: Meet New People
scene: 派对上朋友给你介绍新朋友。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 嗨，我是 Lisa，寿星的同学。
turns.en: Hi, I'm Lisa. I went to school with the birthday boy.
Hi, I'm Zhang Wei. We work together.
What do you do?
Software development. How about you?

turns.cn: 设计师，也许以后能合作。
turns.en: Designer. Maybe we can collaborate sometime.
Sure. Want to exchange contacts?

title: Chain 5/8: Sing Happy Birthday
scene: 八点大家唱生日歌、切蛋糕。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: Thanks everyone for coming. I'm thirty!
Happy birthday! Make a wish.
Done. Come get some cake.
Chocolate. My favorite.
I'll save you a slice to go.

title: Chain 6/8: Sunday BBQ Invite
scene: 派对上另一个朋友邀请你周日烧烤。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: BBQ in my backyard tomorrow. Coming?
What time? I have something in the morning.
Two PM. Come hungry.
Sure. I'll bring a salad.
Perfect. I'll text you the address.

title: Chain 7/8: Backyard BBQ
scene: 周日下午你在朋友家后院烧烤。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 肉还要烤十分钟，先喝点？
turns.en: Meat needs ten more minutes. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 来杯啤酒，谢谢。需要我翻肉吗？
turns.en: A beer, please. Need me to flip anything?

turns.cn: 帮我把那盘香肠拿过来就行。
turns.en: Just grab that tray of sausages.
Your marinade smells amazing!
Secret recipe. I'll teach you sometime.

turns.cn: 好，我带点甜点下次带过来。
turns.en: Deal. I'll bring dessert next time.

title: Chain 8/8: Say Goodbye
scene: 烧烤结束，你和主人家道别。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: I'm stuffed. Thanks for having us!

turns.cn: 客气，下次带你家那位来。
turns.en: Anytime. Bring your partner next time.
Will do. Have a great weekend.
Drive safe. See you around.
See you.
